rationale: Sensitivity experiment — same target as libpng_check_fp_number but with use_bounds=false. This demonstrates that LLM bounds encode a CALLER CONTRACT: with size <= 4 (matching buffer size), the function is proven safe (infeasible); without the bound, KLEE shows the function trusts 'size' blindly and an over-reported size causes OOB read. Same code, opposite verdict — determined by whether the caller contract is modeled.
